summary: Red-team review of H01B hardening batch. Five structural weaknesses identified in PRE-MVP spine. All fixed in this batch. No S2+ issues remain post-fix. System is ready for MVP-1 gate.

findings.description: S4 severity accepted as non-blocking in review_artifact schema. Severity ladder violation: S4 must be halt/blocking.
findings.recommendation: Add if/then constraint: S4 severity requires blocking=true.

findings.description: TLC route_artifact() can be called without any control decision. Routing bypass path exists — artifact can be advanced without an eval gate.
findings.recommendation: Add route_with_control_check() that enforces evaluation_control_decision == allow before routing.

findings.description: compute_content_hash excludes only content_hash but not trace or created_at. Same artifact content with different trace or timestamp produces different hash — replay detection is unreliable.
findings.recommendation: Create hash_utils.py with canonical exclusion policy: exclude content_hash, trace, created_at.

findings.description: issue_registry_artifact schema makes source_segment_ids optional. Issues can be created without any traceable origin in the transcript.
meeting_minutes_artifact decision records have no traceability requirement. Decisions can be asserted without source reference or rationale, allowing hallucinated decisions to pass schema validation.
findings.recommendation: Add anyOf constraint: decisions must have source_reference or rationale.
